semantics: xfail-strict (BROWNFIELD-PROTOCOL v0.1 §4): a test absent from `entries` is expected to pass; `failing-known` entries are expected to fail (or stay quarantined); an unexpectedly-passing entry must be promoted via the explicit protocol (PLAYBOOK v0.2 §7.2), never silently.
note: Run totals and runner version are recorded in terraform/BASELINE.md; this file carries only the exception list, so it stays byte-stable as passing tests are added.

entries.quarantine: #[ignore = "live: hits github.com"] — excluded from the hermetic gate; red when run live against the partially-migrated test orgs
#[ignore = "live: hits gitverse.ru"] — excluded from the hermetic gate; red when run live against the partially-migrated test orgs
#[ignore = "live: hits github.com + gitverse.ru"] — excluded from the hermetic gate; red when run live against the partially-migrated test orgs
